ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost metric entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this metric is associated with */,
  "vma_number" INTEGER /* VMA number associated with the metric */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the cost metric */,
  "fixed_mean" REAL /* Fixed mean cost value */,
  "fixed_high" REAL /* Fixed high cost value */,
  "fixed_low" REAL /* Fixed low cost value */,
  "variable_mean" REAL /* Variable mean cost value */,
  "variable_high" REAL /* Variable high cost value */,
  "variable_low" REAL /* Variable low cost value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the cost metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cost data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., project manager, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_analysis_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_analysis_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update is associated with */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
